title: How to get to Zhangjiajie
text: Zhangjiajie Airport (DYG) has direct flights from Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Chengdu and Chongqing. High-speed trains arrive at Zhangjiajie West station from Changsha (2.5 h), Guilin and Kunming. From the city, buses reach the Forest Park gate in 40 minutes.
